title: Amendment in the Composition of General Council
description: Amendment in the Composition of General Council
text: "THE GAZETTE OF INDIA:EXTRAORDIN [PARTU—S£C.3(ii)] MINISTRY OFSOOAL JUSTICE AND EMPOWERMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 15th June, 2009 / S.O.1509(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (3) of section 3 of the Rehabilitation Council of India Act, 1992 (34 of 1992), the Central Government hereby appoints Dr. Gyan Prakash Pilania, Member of Parliament, Rajya Sabha as member in the Rehabilitation Council of India, and for thatpurpose, makes the following further .-.amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment, number S.O. 1102(E)fdatedthe21stOctober,2002,namely:— , In the said notification, under the heading "Appointed under clause (h) of sub-section (3) of section 3", for serial number (25) and entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely :— "(25) Dr. Gyan Prakash Pilania, Member" Member of Parliament (Rajya Sabha), A-37, Gum Jambheshwer Nagar, Queens Road, Jaipur (Rajasthan). [F.No.25-13/2007-DD.m] ARBTND PRASAD, Jt. Secy. Note: The Rehabilitation Council of India was last constituted vide notification number S.O. 1102(E), dated 21st October, 2002 and subsequently amended vide notification numbers S.O. 693(E), dated 13th June, 2003, S.O. 1140 (E), dated 30th September, 2003, S.O. 550 (E), dated 15th April, 2005, S.O. 975 (E), dated 11th July, . - 2005 and S.O. 2479 (E), dated 15th October, 2008. Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Dethi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
